name: Webshare
description: Webshare is a fast, affordable, and highly dependable proxy server provider for enterprise class Internet data aggregation and analysis applications.

acquisitions.details: Acquired by Oxylabs, industry leader in proxy services

notes: Webshare has grown to support over 60,000 paying customers including Fortune 500 companies. Known for budget-friendly pricing without compromising quality. Network covers 195 countries. Trusted by Ad Verification & Monitoring service providers.
